<!--
Stop. Questions almost certainly belong in GitHub Discussions, not in the issue tracker.

Open this only if your question is short, factual, and likely to result in a documentation fix.

For anything else:

- "How would I do X?" → [GitHub Discussions](../../discussions)
- "Is this the right pattern?" → [GitHub Discussions](../../discussions)
- "Will Sovereign Portal scale to Y?" → [GitHub Discussions](../../discussions)
- "Can you review my architecture?" → that is a paid engagement, see SUPPORT.md
- "I need an answer by Friday for a production deploy" → that is a paid engagement, see SUPPORT.md
-->
